description: Maps stable overlay ids to Remotion components and WordToWorkTranscript props. Each overlay includes `componentProps`: React prop names, types, defaults, and `compositionPropKey` where the composition/plan uses a different field name than the component.

exclusivityGroups.note: At most one active; covers main video area.
Center-heavy text; avoid stacking with full_screen_takeover.
Bottom corners; can pair with captions if safe area respected.

componentProps.name: lines
componentProps.description: Main stacked titles, top to bottom.

componentProps.name: gap
componentProps.description: Vertical space between lines in pixels.

overlays.purpose: Elegant centered stack of italic serif topic lines (e.g. three themes).

componentProps.name: line1
componentProps.description: First headline line.

componentProps.name: line2
componentProps.description: Second line; accent bar sits under this line.

overlays.purpose: Two-line bold headline with a colored accent bar under the second line.

componentProps.name: titleLines
componentProps.description: Headline lines (rendered uppercase).

componentProps.name: subtitle
componentProps.description: Line below the headline.

componentProps.name: buttonLabel
componentProps.description: Pill CTA text; empty hides the button.

componentProps.name: backgroundColor
componentProps.description: Full-frame background; also used for button text color.

componentProps.name: startDelayFrames
componentProps.description: Frames before the first headline line animates.

componentProps.name: staggerFrames
componentProps.description: Stagger between headline lines and subtitle timing.

overlays.purpose: Full-frame solid-color promo: uppercase headline lines, optional subtitle, optional pill button; headline animates from top, button from bottom.

componentProps.name: header
componentProps.description: Small caps section title (e.g. OUR PROCESS).

componentProps.name: items
componentProps.description: Rows with label and icon id.

componentProps.name: backgroundColor
componentProps.description: Solid panel background behind content.

overlays.purpose: Left-aligned timeline: header, vertical line animation, stepped rows with icons and labels.

componentProps.name: meetHeader
componentProps.description: Top-centered uppercase label; empty hides.

componentProps.name: speakerName
componentProps.description: Primary white bar — name.

componentProps.name: speakerDesignation
componentProps.description: Secondary white bar — role; animates after name.

componentProps.name: startDelayFrames
componentProps.description: Extra frames before the name bar slides in.

overlays.purpose: Optional top ‘meet your speaker’ label; two white lower-left bars for name and designation with slide-in from left.

componentProps.name: accentColor
componentProps.description: Highlight color for active word / karaoke styles.

componentProps.name: combineTokensWithinMilliseconds
componentProps.description: Window to merge words into one caption page.

componentProps.name: transcriptSource
componentProps.description: URL or public path to word-level alignment JSON. On PlanComposition the same value is supplied via the prop `wordLevelTranscriptSource`.

componentProps.name: variant
componentProps.description: One of: tiktok | karaoke | lowerThird | minimal.

overlays.purpose: Word- or page-aligned captions driven by alignment JSON (not designed marketing text).
